cs.value: Žil ve 4. stol. př. n. l. Brahmán, jemuž je připisováno autorství Arthašástry.

value.text: A person should not be too honest. Straight trees are cut first and honest people are screwed first.
If a king is energetic, his subjects will be equally energetic.
The area extending from the Himalayas in the north to the sea and a thousand yojanas wide from east to west is the area of operation of the King-Emperor.
